pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Java compiler source and target levels from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 11 features (e.g., var, new APIs) will fail to compile with source/target 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Kotlin compiler JVM target to 11 to align with the Java version upgrade.
pom.xml.why_exists: Kotlin code compiled for JVM 1.8 may not be compatible with Java 11 runtime expectations or features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus framework version from 0.15.0 to 2.0.2.Final.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.0 requires Java 11 and has breaking API changes incompatible with 0.15.0.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch Quarkus dependency management to use the Universe BOM for consistent versioning.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.0 recommends/requires the platform BOM for dependency resolution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JSON-B dependency with Jackson for RESTEasy serialization.
pom.xml.why_exists: JSON-B is deprecated/removed in favor of Jackson in newer Quarkus versions.
